recommendations.title: Miracle on 34th Street

recommendations.title: Live!
recommendations.overview: A mockumentary following an ambitious TV network executive trying to produce a controversial reality show where contestants play Russian Roulette.

recommendations.title: Family for Christmas
recommendations.overview: At the height of her career, investigative journalist Hannah Dunbar finds herself wondering what would have been had she stayed with the love of her life, Ben, 10 years before. When Santa Claus hears her “what ifs?” as a Christmas wish, he transports

recommendations.title: Bamboozled
recommendations.overview: Frustrated when network brass reject his sitcom idea, producer Pierre Delacroix pitches the worst idea he can think of in an attempt to get fired: a 21st century minstrel show. The network not only airs it, but it becomes a smash hit.

recommendations.title: Santa Claus
recommendations.overview: One night, a burglar in a Santa Claus costume is surprised by Victor, a young boy who believes he is the real Santa Claus. Victor then follows him, and they embark on an unexpected adventure that will change their lives.

recommendations.title: It's a SpongeBob Christmas!
recommendations.overview: At Christmastime in Bikini Bottom, everyone's excited except Plankton, who always gets a lump of coal from Santa. But he vows this year he'll finally get his wish – the Krabby Patty formula! And it won't be by being good. He's gonna make everyone in

recommendations.title: No Holds Barred
recommendations.overview: Rip is the World Wrestling Federation champion who is faithful to his fans and the network he wrestles for, but Brell, the new head of the World Television Network, wants Rip to wrestle for his network.

recommendations.title: Switching Goals
recommendations.overview: Twin sisters Emma and Sam come up with a scheme to switch places so each can play in the soccer team they prefer.

recommendations.title: Dear Santa
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Romance, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Crystal, a rich party girl, finds a little girl's letter to Santa asking for a new mother, and she vows to win over the father and daughter before the holidays.

recommendations.title: The Cheetah Girls
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Music, TV Movie
